name: @oddlynew/alchemy-nx-r2-cache-worker
description: Self-hosted Nx remote cache Worker backed by Cloudflare R2

scripts.deploy: ./scripts/with-prod-guard.sh doppler run --project ${DOPPLER_PROJECT:-alchemy-effect-fork} --config ${DOPPLER_CONFIG:-prd} -- alchemy deploy alchemy.run.ts --adopt --yes --stage prod
scripts.destroy: ./scripts/with-prod-guard.sh doppler run --project ${DOPPLER_PROJECT:-alchemy-effect-fork} --config ${DOPPLER_CONFIG:-prd} -- alchemy destroy alchemy.run.ts ${CI:+--yes} --stage prod
scripts.plan: doppler run --project ${DOPPLER_PROJECT:-alchemy-effect-fork} --config ${DOPPLER_CONFIG:-prd} -- alchemy plan alchemy.run.ts --stage prod
